output.final_deliverable:
Results for the MANDATE (visits: https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved)

1) Exact H1 text from https://example.com
- Extracted value: "Example Domain"
- Verbatim evidence (from retrieved memories for https://example.com): "Example Domain" (https://example.com)
- Note: The provided RAW VISIT CONTENT section does not contain the raw page text for https://example.com. Instead, the visit to https://example.com is present in the RETRIEVED MEMORIES data, which contains the quoted page text used above.

2) Exact domain of the external link from https://example.com
- Extracted external link (full URL found on the page): "https://iana.org/domains/example" (https://example.com)
- Exact domain portion (host) of that external link: "iana.org"
- Verbatim evidence (from retrieved memories for https://example.com):
  "Links found on page (1 total):\n- https://iana.org/domains/example (Learn more)" (https://example.com)

3) One URL citation for each visited page
- https://example.com  (citation for the Example Domain page) 
  Verbatim quote (retrieved memories): "Example Domain\nExample Domain\nThis domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations.\nLearn more" (https://example.com)

- https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved  (citation for the IANA-managed Reserved Domains page)
  Verbatim quotes (RAW VISIT CONTENT for https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved):
  "IANA-managed Reserved Domains" (https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved)
  "As described in\nRFC 2606\nand\nRFC 6761\,\n\ta number of domains such as\nexample.com\nand\nexample.org\nare maintained for documentation purposes. These domains may be used as illustrative\n\texamples in documents without prior coordination with us. They are \n\tnot available for registration or transfer." (https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved)

Additional notes about evidence availability and provenance
- The IANA page content and H1 were obtained from the RAW VISIT CONTENT provided for https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved; the quoted lines above are verbatim from that RAW VISIT CONTENT (https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved).
- The example.com page content (including the H1 and the external link) is not present in the RAW VISIT CONTENT block; it is available in the RETRIEVED MEMORIES entries included with the task data. The quotes used for example.com above are verbatim from those RETRIEVED MEMORIES entries and are cited to https://example.com.

Summary of requested outputs (concise)
- H1 (example.com): "Example Domain" (source: https://example.com)
- External link domain (from example.com): "iana.org" (full link on page: "https://iana.org/domains/example") (source: https://example.com)
- URL citations: https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved
output.action_summary: Returned the exact H1 from example.com ("Example Domain"), the exact domain of the external link on example.com ("iana.org", full URL "https://iana.org/domains/example"), and provided one URL citation for each visited page (https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved). Verbatim evidence for the IANA page is from the RAW VISIT CONTENT (https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved). Verbatim evidence for example.com is from the provided RETRIEVED MEMORIES entries (https://example.com); note that RAW VISIT CONTENT for example.com was not present in the RAW VISIT CONTENT block.

6ffa4896-39d3-440c-a3a4-574c478e8e55.title: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and extract a URL citation

details.goal: Load the IANA 'domains reserved' page and produce one URL citation (the page's canonical URL) and any page metadata needed for verification.

extract_fields.page_url_citation: The exact URL to cite for this visited page (string)
extract_fields.page_title_or_h1: Optional: the page title or H1 text for verification (string, optional)

details.justification: The mandate explicitly names this URL. Visiting it provides the required citation for that page and ensures we have fresh page content to merge with the example.com results already present in memory.
details.original_goal: Load the IANA 'domains reserved' page and produce one URL citation (the page's canonical URL) and any page metadata needed for verification.
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

action_result.content:
IANA-managed Reserved Domains
Certain domains are set aside, and nominally registered to “IANA”, for specific
		policy or technical purposes.
Example domains
As described in
RFC 2606
and
RFC 6761
,
	a number of domains such as
example.com
and
example.org
are maintained for documentation purposes. These domains may be used as illustrative
	examples in documents without prior coordination with us. They are 
	not available for registration or transfer.
Test IDN top-level domains
These domains were temporarily delegated by IANA for the
IDN Evaluation
being conducted by
ICANN
.

Policy-reserved domains
We act as both the registrant and registrar for a select number of domains
		which have been reserved under policy grounds. These exclusions are
		typically indicated in either technical standards (RFC documents),
		or
contractual limitations
.
Domains which are described as registered to IANA or ICANN on policy
		grounds are not available for registration or transfer, with the exception
		of
country-name
.info
domains. These domains are available for release
		by the ICANN Governmental Advisory Committee Secretariat.
Other Special-Use Domains
There is additionally a
Special-Use Domain Names
registry documenting special-use domains designated by technical standards. For further information, see
Special-Use Domain Names
(RFC 6761).

31cbba64-1421-4830-a105-4198a16c7baf.title: Merge example.com visit results (from memory) with the IANA visit and produce final outputs

details.goal: Produce the three requested final outputs using existing example.com visit data plus the newly visited IANA page:

output_fields.example_external_link_domain: Exact domain of the external link found on https://example.com (e.g., 'iana.org') (string)

citations.https://example.com: One URL citation for the example.com page (string)
citations.https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved: One URL citation for the IANA page (string)

data_sources.example.com: Use prior successful visit results from the ancestor/memory (do not re-visit).
data_sources.iana_reserved: Use results from the visit child that loads https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved.

details.merge_instructions: Extract the exact H1 text and the exact domain of the external link from the stored example.com visit output; pull the page URL (canonical/visited URL) from the IANA visit output as its citation. Ensure exact string fidelity (no normalization) when returning the H1 and domain.
details.justification: Avoids re-visiting example.com because a successful visit already exists in memory. Visiting the IANA page ensures we have a fresh citation for that page. This step merges both sources to produce the three precise, verifiable outputs required by the mandate.
details.original_goal: Produce the three requested final outputs using existing example.com visit data plus the newly visited IANA page:
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

details.goal: Visit and extract information from https://example.com
